sections.title: program policy and requirements
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes the framework for a safe and healthy work environment at MH Construction, Inc. It aims to prevent workplace injuries, illnesses, and fatalities by outlining clear guidelines and responsibilities for all personnel involved in company operations.

Scope

This policy applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors on MH Construction job sites. Adherence to these requirements is mandatory to ensure compliance with regulatory standards and company safety objectives.

sections.title: safety and health orientation
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes the framework for a comprehensive Safety and Health Orientation program at MH Construction, Inc. It aims to ensure all personnel are aware of potential hazards and the measures required to maintain a safe working environment, thereby preventing accidents and promoting compliance with regulatory standards.

Scope

This program applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, temporary workers, and visitors present on any MH Construction job site or facility. Adherence to these guidelines is mandatory for all individuals to ensure a consistent and high standard of safety across all operations.

sections.title: emergency response
sections.previewHtml:
PURPOSE

This policy establishes clear guidelines for emergency response procedures, ensuring the safety and well-being of all personnel on MH Construction job sites. It aims to mitigate risks associated with unforeseen emergencies and protect against potential injuries or property damage.

SCOPE

This Emergency Response policy applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors present on any MH Construction job site. Adherence to these procedures is mandatory to maintain a safe working environment.

sections.title: event reporting of incidents accidents and near misses
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes guidelines for the comprehensive reporting and investigation of all incidents, accidents, and near misses to ensure a safe working environment. It aims to identify root causes, implement corrective actions, and prevent recurrence, thereby protecting employees, subcontractors, and company assets from harm.

Scope

This policy applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors present on any MH Construction job site or property.

sections.title: personal protective equipment
sections.previewHtml:
PURPOSE

This policy establishes guidelines for the selection, use, and maintenance of Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) to safeguard MH Construction employees, subcontractors, and visitors from workplace hazards. It aims to prevent injuries, illnesses, and fatalities by ensuring appropriate protection against identified risks.

SCOPE

This policy applies to all MH Construction employees, subcontractors, and visitors present on any MH Construction job site. Adherence to these requirements is mandatory to maintain a safe working environment.

sections.title: welding cutting and heating operations
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes guidelines for safe welding, cutting, and heating operations to prevent injuries, fires, and exposure to hazardous fumes. It aims to protect all personnel from the inherent risks associated with these activities on MH Construction job sites.

Scope

This policy applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors engaged in or exposed to welding, cutting, and heating operations on any MH Construction job site.

sections.title: lock and tag
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes minimum performance requirements for the control of hazardous energy during servicing and maintenance of machines and equipment. It aims to prevent unexpected energization, startup, or release of stored energy that could cause injury to employees. Adherence to these procedures protects personnel from serious harm or fatality.

Scope

This program applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors who may be exposed to hazardous energy sources during the servicing and maintenance of machines, equipment, or systems on any MH Construction job site or facility.

sections.title: aerial lifts and elevating work platforms
heat related illness prevention
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes guidelines and procedures to prevent heat-related illnesses among all personnel working on MH Construction job sites. It aims to protect employees, subcontractors, and visitors from the dangers of excessive heat exposure, ensuring a safe and healthy work environment as mandated by regulatory standards.

Scope

This program applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors present on any MH Construction job site where there is a potential for heat exposure.

sections.title: signs signals and barricades
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes guidelines for the proper use of signs, signals, and barricades to prevent accidents and ensure the safety of all personnel on MH Construction job sites. It aims to protect employees, subcontractors, and the public from hazards associated with construction activities, particularly those involving traffic and restricted areas.

Scope

This policy applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors present on MH Construction job sites. Adherence to these guidelines is mandatory to maintain a safe working environment.

sections.title: respiratory protection
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes the minimum requirements for respiratory protection at MH Construction, Inc. It aims to prevent occupational diseases and injuries that may result from exposure to hazardous atmospheres, ensuring the health and safety of all personnel on our job sites.

Scope

This program applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors who may be exposed to respiratory hazards or are required to wear respiratory protection on any MH Construction job site.

sections.title: floor openings open sided surfaces and ramps
rigging
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

The purpose of this policy is to establish clear guidelines and procedures for safe rigging operations within MH Construction, Inc. This ensures the protection of employees, equipment, and property from hazards associated with material handling and lifting activities, thereby preventing accidents and injuries on all job sites.

Scope

This policy applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors engaged in or exposed to rigging operations on any MH Construction job site.

sections.title: commercial drivers drug and prevention program
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes guidelines for the Commercial Drivers Drug and Alcohol Prevention Program. It ensures compliance with federal and state regulations, safeguarding the well-being of employees and the public by preventing substance abuse among commercial drivers.

Scope

This program applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees who operate commercial motor vehicles (CMVs) requiring a Commercial Driver"s License (CDL), as well as any subcontractors or visitors on MHC job sites who fall under the purview of DOT drug and alcohol testing regulations.

sections.title: distracted driving and fleet safety policy
cold weather and winter operations safety
struck by and caught in between hazard prevention
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes comprehensive guidelines and procedures to proactively prevent injuries and fatalities resulting from struck-by and caught-in/between hazards within all MH Construction operations. It aims to safeguard all personnel on MH Construction job sites by ensuring strict adherence to regulatory standards and fostering a robust, proactive safety culture that prioritizes hazard identification and mitigation.

Scope

This policy is universally applicable to all MH Construction employees, subcontractors, and any visitors present on MH Construction job sites. Strict adherence to these guidelines is a mandatory requirement for maintaining a secure and compliant working environment, thereby minimizing risks associated with struck-by and caught-in/between incidents.

sections.title: subcontractor management plan
sections.previewHtml:
PURPOSE

This policy establishes guidelines for managing subcontractors to ensure a safe working environment on all MH Construction job sites. It aims to prevent accidents, injuries, and occupational illnesses by clearly defining safety expectations and responsibilities for all parties involved.

SCOPE

This plan applies to all MH Construction employees, all subcontractors, and any visitors present on MH Construction job sites. Adherence to these guidelines is mandatory to maintain a consistent safety standard across all projects.

sections.title: incident investigation root cause analysis
sections.previewHtml:
Purpose

This policy establishes a systematic approach for investigating incidents to identify root causes, prevent recurrence, and ensure a safe working environment. It protects employees, subcontractors, and the company from hazards and operational disruptions.

Scope

This policy applies to all MH Construction, Inc. employees, subcontractors, and visitors on MH Construction job sites. All personnel are required to adhere to the procedures outlined herein.
